name: White Chocolate Ice Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine 1 cup heavy whipping cream and 1 cup whole milk in a heavy saucepan with 1/3 cup sugar.
2. Heat the mixture to a simmer over medium-low heat.
3. Whisk egg yolks in a separate bowl.
4. Pour hot cream mixture into egg yolks, a few droplets at first, whisking slowly to warm the yolks.
5. Gradually add the hot cream mixture back into the saucepan, stirring constantly.
6. Cook over medium-low heat until the mixture thickens slightly and leaves a clean path on the back of a wooden spoon when drawn with a finger across it (do not exceed 170°F if using a candy thermometer).
7. Remove from heat and stir in chopped white chocolate until melted. Use high-quality chocolate with cocoa butter as an ingredient.
8. Strain into a bowl to remove any unmelted chocolate or egg yolks that may have coagulated.
9. Cover and refrigerate until thoroughly chilled.
10. Process in an ice cream maker according to the manufacturer's instructions.
